escalation_levels.description: email trigger on the verification date
escalation_levels.verify_assets_email_subject: Please verify all assets in your branch
escalation_levels.verify_assets_email_body:
Dear Sir/Madam,  
 
 > This is to inform you, to verify pending assets in your branch. \n    > Kindly login to below URL and complete the FAR verification process. 
    > URL: https://digitalregister.karnataka.com/
escalation_levels.verify_assets_email_signature:
Thanks, 
 Admin Department 
  karnataka Bank Ltd.

escalation_levels.description: email trigger on the post delay of 2 days from verification date
escalation_levels.rol_verify_assets_email_subject: Asset verification pending in your branches
escalation_levels.rol_verify_assets_email_body:
Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
    > Attached file contains list of branches having assets pending for verification. 
    > Kindly login to below URL and complete the FAR verification process. 
    > URL: https://digitalregister.karnataka.com/
escalation_levels.rol_verify_assets_email_signature:
Thanks, 
 Admin Department 
  karnataka Bank Ltd.

escalation_levels.description: email trigger on the  post delay of 4 days verification date
